sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n64178" key="luroqelgh/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">λῠρο-θελγής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ές</itype>, <sense id="n64178.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">charmed by the lyre,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">AP</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">9.250</biblScope> </bibl> (<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Honest.</author> </bibl>).</sense> </entryFree>
